name: project-advisor
description: Project planning skills for recommending what to build next, writing PRDs, and turning approved PRDs into Jira-ready work items.

interface.shortDescription: Product planning and PRD workflow skills.
interface.longDescription: Packages a project-advice workflow that moves from identifying the best next product bet to writing a PRD and slicing it into Jira-ready work items.
defaultPrompt: Use the next-best-thing skill to recommend the best next improvement for this repo.
Help me write a PRD for this feature idea using the write-a-prd skill.
Break this PRD into Jira-ready vertical slices with the prd-to-issues skill.
